title: Dense Dry Ethiopian Red Lentils Misir Wot
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish made with red lentils, dried red chillies, and render fat, this recipe is a quick and flavorful Whole30-friendly option.

ingredients.name: dried red chillies
ingredients.notes: crushed or 1 teaspoon dried red chilli flakes

instructions: Heat the render fat in a molcajete over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the crushed dried red chillies and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red lentils, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Serve the misir wot hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
